message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with latest status updates and compacted entries

Refresh beads issue tracker timestamps, update resolution statuses,
and refine content for entries related to RGC scenario coverage,
operator runbook obligations, and verification gate tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
